INITIAL INVESTIGATION REPORT (SUPPLEMENTAL) (CONFIDENTIAL)

THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR ON JAN-25-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 503 FOR A PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON AND STATE OF THE CONSERVATEE, SAU WOON TOY. THE COURT HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENTS FROM COUNSEL, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO APPOINT A TEMPORARY CONSERVATOR AND APPOINTS DEBRA J. DOLCH AS THE TEMPORARY CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON AND OF THE STATE OF SAU WOON TOY FOR 90 DAYS PENDING THE HEARING. BOND SHALL BE POSTED IN THE SUM OF $261,000.00. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APR-21-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 503 FOR A HEARING ON THE APPOINTMENT OF A GENERAL CONSERVATOR. JUDGE KATHERINE FEINSTEIN, CLERK CARLA AMADOR, ANN MENDOZA CSR #6812.
